arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Atlético Madrid vs. RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Marco Rose's team have made the trip to the Spanish capital to get their UEFA Champions League campaign underway with a challenging matchup against Atlético Madrid where both lineups have just been announced.
Jamie Griffith has taken a look at the whole fixture list for week four of the Bundesliga season and selected a score prediction for each game.

arts.ttl: Preview | Atlético Madrid vs RB Leipzig: A big test for The Saxons
arts.sum: RB Leipzig face a tough opening Champions League away to Atlético Madrid. With games against Juventus, Inter, and Liverpool to come, it’s crucial The Saxons get off to the perfect…

arts.ttl: Atlético Madrid vs. RB Leipzig: UEFA Champions League team news, match stats & LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Xavi and Loïs Openda are among the RB Leipzig gems looking to star on the continental stage after making a strong start to their Bundesliga campaign as they visit Diego Simeone's Atlético Madrid in their opening UEFA Champions League fixture on Thursday (kick-off: 9pm CEST). New signing Antonio Nusa also looks ready to make an impact on the European stage if called upon, the Norwegian teenager having already scored off the bench in the Bundesliga and DFB Cup. Captain and defensive lynchpin Willi Orbán is back at head coach Marco Rose's disposal again, meanwhile, after a domestic suspension ruled him out of the goalless draw with Union Berlin on Matchday 3.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs RB Leipzig: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid host RB Leipzig this Thursday as both sides begin their 2024/25 Champions League campaigns with a tricky test. Atletico have made an encouraging start to the season, however, winning three of their opening five La Liga fixtures and keeping four clean sheets in the process.

arts.ttl: Conor Gallagher's subtle dig at Chelsea over summer exit
arts.sum: Gallagher, who spent 18 years as a Chelsea player – most of his life, also seems to have little problem in talking about Atletico being a step up for his career. It was previously reported that Chelsea had only offered Gallagher a two-year contract with the option of a third.

arts.ttl: Poulsen would only consider leaving Leipzig for one of Europe's biggest clubs
arts.sum: Yussuf Poulsen has revealed that he would only consider leaving RB Leipzig for one of the eight biggest clubs in Europe.

arts.ttl: Xavi Simons says £55m Arsenal target is actually better than Kobbie Mainoo
arts.sum: Arsenal didn’t manage to sign a new striker this summer, but it wasn’t for the lack of trying. Indeed, the Gunners looked into signing a...

arts.ttl: 5 reasons why RB Leipzig will beat Atlético Madrid in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: New signing Antonio Nusa, who made four Champions League appearances with former team Club Brugge, scored the only goal in his side’s 1-0 win over VfL Bochum on the opening weekend of Bundesliga action, which he then followed up on with an assist for Openda’s winner against Leverkusen. The returning Xavi Simons was the man that set up Nusa for his first goal in Leipzig colours, while Openda’s strike partner Benjamin Šeško provided him with the assist for his first, and Leipzig’s second, against Xabi Alonso ’s men.
